builds_on.name: RAG
builds_on.evidence: “Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enables large language models (LLMs) to access and reason over external knowledge”

builds_on.name: Active RAG
builds_on.evidence: “Active RAG techniques ... interleaved query generation, retrieval, and reasoning in a multi-turn loop.”

builds_on.name: Self-RAG
builds_on.evidence: “Self-RAG ... distilled such behaviors from larger models into smaller ones via supervised fine-tuning”

builds_on.name: RLVR
builds_on.evidence: “the recent emergence of reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR)”
